method.hint: How this expiration is checked when its event fires.
method.label: Method

formula.hint: Formula rolled when checking this expiration.
formula.label: Roll Formula

threshold.hint: The roll must satisfy the comparison against this threshold to expire.
threshold.label: Threshold

absent.hint: This expires only while the actor has none of these conditions.
absent.label: Absent Conditions

present.hint: This expires only while the actor has all of these conditions.
present.label: Present Conditions

trigger.hint: This expires when the selected trigger occurs.
trigger.label: Trigger
